hooks.command: bash -c 'NOTES_DIR="${TUTOR_NOTES_DIR:-$HOME/tutor-notes}"; SCRATCH="$NOTES_DIR/.scratch-active.md"; if [ -f "$SCRATCH" ]; then TOPIC=$(grep -m1 "^topic:" "$SCRATCH" 2>/dev/null | sed "s/topic: //"); echo "WARNING: Active session-log scratch not wrapped (topic: ${TOPIC:-untitled}). Run /session-end next session or /recover if you forgot /session-start."; fi'
